title: Kinematics
subject: physics
summary: Kinematics studies motion without considering forces.
This topic is heavily tested in SPTG and forms the base for all mechanics problems.
Key skills include interpreting graphs, using equations of motion, and handling relative motion.
coreConcepts: Displacement is a vector, distance is a scalar.
Velocity includes direction, speed does not.
Acceleration is the rate of change of velocity.
Uniform acceleration allows use of SUVAT equations.
Graphs (s-t, v-t, a-t) are critical and often tested.
derive: From constant acceleration definition: v = u + at.
Integrating velocity gives displacement: s = ut + (1/2)at^2.
traps: Using average speed instead of average velocity.
Using SUVAT when acceleration is not constant.
In free fall, initial velocity is not always zero.

sptgSet.question: An object starts from rest and accelerates at 2 m/s^2 for 5 s. Find final velocity.
An object moves with initial velocity 10 m/s and acceleration 2 m/s^2 for 5 s. Find displacement.
A car accelerates from 0 to 20 m/s in 4 s. Find acceleration.
Find displacement if u = 5 m/s, a = 2 m/s^2, t = 4 s.
Find final velocity if u = 10 m/s, a = -2 m/s^2, t = 3 s.
Find acceleration if u = 5 m/s, v = 15 m/s, t = 5 s.
An object falls freely for 4 s. Find velocity (g=10).
An object is thrown upward at 20 m/s. Find maximum height (g=10).
Time to reach highest point if u=20 m/s (g=10).
Two objects move toward each other at 10 m/s and 15 m/s, 100 m apart. When do they meet?

hardSet.question: A car accelerates uniformly from 10 m/s to 30 m/s over 100 m. Find acceleration.
An object thrown upward returns after 6 s. Find initial velocity.
An object moves with u=0 and reaches 20 m/s in 5 s. Find displacement.
A particle moves such that v increases linearly from 0 to 20 m/s in 4 s. Find displacement.
An object is dropped from 80 m. Find time to reach ground (g=10).
Two cars start 200 m apart moving in same direction at 20 m/s and 10 m/s. When does faster catch slower?
An object is thrown downward at 10 m/s from height 45 m. Find time to hit ground.
Find displacement if v-t graph is triangle from 0 to 10 m/s over 5 s.
A body decelerates from 20 m/s to rest in 5 s. Find displacement.
An object travels half time at speed v1 and half time at v2. Find average speed.

pat3Set.question: A particle moves with v = 2t + 3. Find displacement from t=0 to 4.
A body moves with acceleration 4 m/s^2. Find distance in 3rd second.
A particle moves with u=10 m/s and a=-2 m/s^2. When does it stop?
A ball thrown up reaches height 45 m. Find initial velocity.
Find ratio of distances in successive seconds for uniform acceleration.
A particle moves with constant acceleration. Distance ratio in 2nd and 3rd second?
An object dropped and another thrown upward. When do they meet?
A body travels with variable velocity v = t^2. Find displacement 0→2.
Find acceleration from v-t graph slope.
Find displacement from area under v-t graph.
